brand.heroHeadline: Where time slows down, and something within you begins to realign
brand.heroSub: A curated slow-living journey into the Egyptian desert — for those seeking depth over speed, presence over distraction, and meaning over movement.
brand.philosophyTitle: This is not tourism. This is restoration.
brand.philosophyBody:
Hidden between the endless golden dunes of the Egyptian desert lies a place where time slows down… and something within you begins to realign. Siwa is not a destination you simply visit — it is a space you enter to reconnect with silence, nature, and yourself.

Here, the rhythm of life follows the wind, the sun, and the stillness of the salt lakes. Every sunrise feels like a renewal, and every sunset feels like a quiet return to something deeply familiar.

You will float in mineral salt lakes with therapeutic properties, soak in ancient hot springs surrounded by palm trees, cross silent deserts under infinite skies, and gather with Siwan families beneath a star-flooded night. Each moment is intentionally designed to bring clarity, grounding, and inner expansion.

A return to simplicity. A reconnection with the body. A quiet conversation with nature.
brand.philosophyClosing: Leave Siwa not as a visitor… but as someone who has remembered something they had forgotten.
brand.experiencesTitle: Moments that stay with you for years
brand.experiencesIntro: Every journey is woven from the same living elements of the oasis — water that holds you, deserts that quiet you, and rituals that bring you home to yourself.
brand.programsTitle: Six ways to remember something you had forgotten
brand.programsIntro: From a single luminous night to a six-day retreat into stillness, each itinerary is shaped slowly and intentionally — and tailored to you. Tell us how long you have, and we will hold the rest.
brand.priceOnRequest: Tailored to your group — price on request

experiences.title: Salt Lakes & Floating
experiences.desc: Step into turquoise water so rich in minerals it cradles you weightless on its surface. Lie back, let go, and feel the salt draw every knot of tension from the body. This is more than a swim — it is a physical release, a quiet shedding of negative energy, surrounded by white shores that stretch into pure desert silence.
highlights: Effortless floating in mineral-rich turquoise water
A therapeutic, body-releasing soak unique to Siwa
Blinding-white salt shores and mirror-still reflections
Deep stillness far from crowds and noise
Soft, photogenic light at dawn and golden hour
Gentle guidance for first-time floaters

experiences.title: Cleopatra's Spring, Hot Springs & Salt Cave
experiences.desc: Lower yourself into warm natural water among fruiting palms, where legend says royalty once bathed. Then drift between ancient hot springs and a candlelit salt cave for a session of deep relaxation — warmth, mineral air, and soft light loosening everything the journey has carried. A ritual of warmth, patience, and quiet renewal.
highlights: Warm natural waters of the storied Cleopatra's Spring
Ancient hot springs framed by swaying palms
Candlelit salt-cave deep-relaxation session
Mineral-rich air believed to soothe and restore
An unhurried, contemplative pace
Surroundings of green oasis and birdsong

experiences.title: Great Sand Sea 4x4 Safari & Sandboarding
experiences.location: Great Sand Sea & Siwa nature reserve
experiences.desc: Ride deep into the wind-sculpted dunes of the Great Sand Sea, where stories are born in the heart of the sand. Crest golden ridges by 4x4, glide down soft slopes on a board, then fall silent as the desert turns deep gold at sunset. As night arrives, gather at the campfire for a Bedouin feast and mint tea beneath a perfectly clear, star-flooded sky.
highlights: Thrilling 4x4 crossing of the Great Sand Sea dunes
Sandboarding down soft golden slopes
Bedouin charcoal-cooked desert lunch
Tea shared with local Bedouin hosts
The majestic desert sunset over endless dunes
Campfire dinner and Siwan mint tea under the stars
Stargazing in absolute, untouched darkness

experiences.title: Temple of the Oracle & Living History
experiences.location: Temple of Amun & Mountain of the Dead
experiences.desc: Stand where Alexander the Great once sought answers amid the desert's silence, at the Temple of the Oracle of Amun. From above, a sweeping panorama unfolds — a green sea of palm and olive groves fighting the sand to the horizon. Nearby, Pharaonic and Greek tombs carved into the Mountain of the Dead carry the oasis's layered, luminous history.
highlights: The legendary Temple of the Oracle of Amun
Walking in the footsteps of Alexander the Great
Sweeping panorama over the green oasis and shimmering lakes
Pharaonic and Greek tombs of the Mountain of the Dead
Stories of ancient pilgrims and seekers
Golden light over palm and olive groves

experiences.title: Shali Fortress & Old Town
experiences.desc: Wander the ancient alleys of Shali, the old mud-brick town built from kershef — salt-saturated earth that glows amber in the late sun. Learn the rhythms of Siwan life at the local museum, browse the old market for dates, olives and handicrafts, then watch the sunset from atop the fortress as the whole oasis softens into evening.
highlights: Walking the ancient kershef alleys of Shali
The story of salt-mud architecture, glowing at dusk
Sunset from the top of the old fortress
Siwan Museum — homes, customs, dress and daily life
Old market for dates, olives and Siwan crafts
Optional candlelit dinner on the Shali rooftop

experiences.title: White Desert & Night Camping
experiences.desc: Cross into a landscape that feels like another planet — chalk-white rock formations sculpted by wind into mushrooms, towers and dunes, scattered across a silent sea of sand. Pass the Black Desert, Crystal Mountain and Agabat Valley by 4x4, then make camp as the sky catches fire. Dinner by the fire, tea, and a night spent beneath one of the clearest skies on Earth.
highlights: Surreal chalk-white rock formations of the White Desert
Black Desert, Crystal Mountain and Agabat Valley
Mushroom Rock and wind-carved sculptures
Sunset and sunrise over the desert silence
Traditional Bedouin campfire dinner
Overnight camping beneath a sky thick with stars
Cold sulfur spring and hidden desert valleys

experiences.title: Sunset Island & Tea Ritual
experiences.desc: Sail across still water to one of Siwa's enchanting islands and sit in silence as the sun sinks into the lake. The mint-tea ritual is poured slowly, the air cools, and the day releases its hold. This is the quiet return — the moment the oasis asks nothing of you but to be present, and to remember.
highlights: Sunset sail to a serene Siwa island
Sitting in stillness as the sun melts into the lake
The slow, warming Siwan mint-tea ritual
Mirror-calm water and soft evening colour
Birdsong, palms and absolute quiet
An intentional moment of presence and reflection

programs.name: Discover the Magic of Siwa
programs.subtitle: 1 Night / 2 Days — a first taste of the oasis that lingers
programs.summary: An evening transfer from Cairo by private car or coach, then two intentional days that gather Siwa's essence — its temple, its springs, its dunes and its salt — into one luminous first encounter.

days.title: Day 1 — Discovering Siwa's magic
items: Evening transfer from Cairo by private car or coach (your choice)
Arrival at Siwa Oasis, hotel check-in and rest after the journey
Temple of the Oracle of Amun, where Alexander the Great once sought answers
Sweeping panorama over the oasis, shimmering lakes and palm and olive groves
Cleopatra's Spring — warm natural water among the palms
4x4 safari into the Siwa nature reserve, dunes and sandboarding with photo stops
Bedouin tea shared with local hosts
Sunset in the desert and a Bedouin dinner under the open sky
Stargazing, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 2 — Between salt and history
items: Effortless floating in the turquoise, mineral-rich salt lakes
Natural hot springs
Deep-relaxation session inside the salt cave
Siwan Museum — local life, houses, customs and dress
Shali Fortress and the old mud-brick alleys
Sunset on one of Siwa's beautiful islands
Return to Cairo in the evening

programs.name: Siwa, 2 Nights / 3 Days
programs.subtitle: 2 Nights / 3 Days — room to breathe, drift and arrive
programs.summary: A morning or evening transfer from Cairo and an itinerary shaped around you — temple and spring, a full day in the Great Sand Sea, and slow island mornings, all unfolding at the pace of the oasis.

days.title: Day 1 — Arrival & first light
items: Transfer from Cairo, morning or evening, by car or coach
Arrival, hotel check-in and rest
Temple of the Oracle of Amun
Cleopatra's Spring
A beautiful Siwa island and sunset amid stunning nature
Candlelit dinner at a restaurant, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 2 — Salt, springs & the Great Safari
items: Floating in the salt lakes
Natural hot springs and a salt-cave relaxation session
4x4 safari into the desert with a special Siwan lunch cooked in the heart of the sand
Siwa nature reserve — dunes, gravel fields and mountains, with photo stops
Bedouin tea with locals and sandboarding
Desert sunset and a Bedouin dinner under the open sky
Stargazing, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 3 — Island breakfast & old Shali
items: Breakfast on one of Siwa's beautiful islands
Shali Fortress and a wander through the old alleys
Departure at 10:30 pm back to Cairo

programs.name: Live the Legend
programs.subtitle: 4 Days / 3 Nights — to live the legend, not just visit it
programs.summary: Four unhurried days that move from the footsteps of Alexander to a full day in the Great Sand Sea, from white healing waters to a candlelit dinner on the Shali rooftop — and home again with a new heart.

days.title: Day 1 — Crossing into the land of secrets & the first sunset
items: Arrival and relaxation, breathing the pure oasis air of olive and palm
Temple of the Oracle of Amun, in the footsteps of Alexander the Great, with a full panorama of Siwa as a green sea fighting the sand
Cleopatra's Spring — warm natural water among fruiting palms
Sunset sail to one of Siwa's enchanting islands; sit in silence as the sun sinks into the lake
Warm Siwan dinner in the calm oasis air, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 2 — The Great Safari, where stories are born in the sand
items: Traditional breakfast amid pristine nature on a Siwa island
10:30 am — 4x4 vehicles set off into the Great Sand Sea for a full day
A real thrill crossing the golden, wind-sculpted dunes
A very special Bedouin lunch cooked on charcoal the authentic way
Sandboarding on the soft sand
The majestic desert sunset as the sands turn deep gold
Campfire gathering (raqya) with a lavish Bedouin dinner and Siwan mint tea under a star-studded sky, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 3 — White healing, the scent of history & luminous Shali
items: Salt lakes — float effortlessly and release every negative energy
Hot springs and deep relaxation inside the salt cave under soft candlelight
Mountain of the Dead — Pharaonic and Greek tombs carved into the mountain
Shali Fortress and the story of kershef, the salt-saturated mud brick
Sunset watched from atop the fortress
Free time in the old market for dates, olives and Siwan handicrafts
An exceptional candlelit dinner on the Shali rooftop, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 4 — Farewell, returning with a new heart
items: Breakfast at the hotel and one last look at the oasis
Check-out and departure, carrying a Siwan calm that stays with you for years

programs.name: Nature, Relaxation & Meditation Retreat
programs.subtitle: 5 Nights / 6 Days — for lovers of nature, quiet and simple living
programs.summary: The deepest immersion — six days of salt lakes, natural springs, open desert and authentic Siwan culture, with space woven in to meditate, restore, and simply be.

days.title: Day 1 — Arrival & relaxation
items: Arrival and hotel check-in, then rest
A natural hot spring with warm, soothing water
Time to relax and meditate in the calm of the oasis
A healthy dinner and overnight

days.title: Day 2 — Salt lakes & Shali Fortress
items: Traditional Siwan breakfast on a beautiful natural island
Natural floating in the salt lakes
A hot spring for relaxation
Shali Fortress and the old town; walking the historic alleys and learning the oasis's history and culture
Sunset from atop the fortress
A special dinner amid heritage ambience and candlelight, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 3 — Great Sand Sea safari
items: Full-day desert safari through golden dunes and enchanting landscapes
Meditation and quiet in the desert nature
A healthy, special Siwan lunch
Sunset in the heart of the desert
Bedouin dinner under the open sky and stargazing in clear night skies, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 4 — Relaxation & nature day
items: Salt lakes
A natural-oil care session
Hot springs to relax and renew
Return to the hotel and rest
A calm boat trip to one of Siwa's natural islands
Sunset amid stunning nature, then return to the hotel

days.title: Day 5 — Cleopatra's Spring & Temple of Amun
items: Cleopatra's Spring and its natural surroundings
Salt-cave relaxation session
Free time
Temple of the Oracle of Amun
A natural mountain for a panoramic view over the oasis
Sunset, dinner and return to the hotel

days.title: Day 6 — Departure
items: Breakfast and hotel check-out
Return to Cairo with unforgettable memories

programs.name: Bahariya Oasis & White Desert
programs.subtitle: 1 Night / 2 Days — into the otherworldly white
programs.summary: A swift escape from Cairo into the surreal landscapes of Bahariya and the White Desert — black peaks, crystal mountains and chalk-white sculptures, with a night camped beneath an ocean of stars.

days.title: Day 1 — Across the desert to the white
items: 07:00 depart Cairo; 11:00 arrive at Bahariya Oasis; lunch
Begin the 4x4 desert safari: Black Desert and Bedouin village
Crystal Mountain, Agabat Valley and Mushroom Rock
Old White Desert and New White Desert rock formations
Sunset over the White Desert, then arrive at the camping site
Traditional Bedouin dinner (grilled chicken), tea and a campfire gathering
Stargazing and overnight in a tent (one tent for every two people)

days.title: Day 2 — Sunrise & return
items: Sunrise in the desert
Breakfast at the camp
Morning exploration of more rock formations and unique landscapes
Return to Bahariya Oasis; 10:00 depart towards Cairo

programs.name: White Desert Expedition
programs.subtitle: 3 Days / 2 Nights — deep into the silence of the sand
programs.summary: A fully supported three-day expedition through the Black and White Deserts — sulfur springs, crystal mountains, hidden valleys and a night camped in the heart of the New White Desert, all meals and equipment cared for.
inclusions: Breakfast, lunch and dinner — all meals during the tour
Mineral water, fruits, hot and soft drinks
Full camping equipment: tent, mattresses, blankets and sleeping bags
One night hotel accommodation in Bahariya Oasis
One night camping in the White Desert

days.title: Day 1 — Into the Black Desert
items: Departure to the desert
Black Desert and Cold Sulfur Spring
Bedouin village and Crystal Mountain
Return to Bahariya Oasis; dinner
Overnight at the hotel in Bahariya Oasis

days.title: Day 2 — Full-day safari & camping
items: Full-day desert safari: El Agabat area and sandboarding
Moon Cave, Valley of the Palm and Valley Camps
New White Desert and Old White Desert formations
Bedouin dinner
Overnight camping in the New White Desert beneath the stars and the peaceful desert atmosphere

days.title: Day 3 — Sunrise & farewell
items: Sunrise in the White Desert
Breakfast
Explore more of the White Desert formations
Return to Bahariya Oasis and departure
